LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION AND HEARING AND APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION AFTER HEARING IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR THE VEHICLE SHALL BE ISSUED. AUTOWORLD IS DIRECTED TO IMMEDIATELY DELIVER POSSESSION OF THE VEHICLE TO TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT OR ITS AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE. Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

An Le, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATIN, a California Corporation, aka TOYOTA LEASE TRUST ("TOYOTA")
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AUTOWORLD COLLISION.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Susan Lane sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $16,000.00
Attorney''s Fees and costs: $1,750.00

Total Judgment in the amount of $17,750.00
Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: AN LE, ESQ., 949.225.7957, FOR PLAINTIFF TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION'S Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing And Application For Writ Of Possession After Hearing IS Granted. No opposition filed. A writ of possession for the vehicle shall be issued. Autoworld is directed to immediately deliver possession of the vehicle to Toyota Motor Credit or its authorized representative. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Continued To Jan-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
